title: Joshua Macias’s CV
text:
Software Engineering Student with a Data Science Minor. Experience in data integrity, data visualization, student records operations, and dashboard development.

joshuamm@hotmail.es | (208) 809-9164 | LinkedIn | GitHub



Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering student at Brigham Young University Idaho, building experience in software development, data analysis, visualization, and data driven decision making.


Data integrity, dashboard development, data visualization, student records systems, software engineering, and cross functional collaboration.



Data analytics, machine learning, software design, database systems, visualization, and full stack development.




January 2023 - April 2027 Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, Idaho

Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering
Data Science Minor
Relevant coursework: Data Structures and Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Design Patterns, Probability and Statistics, Machine Learning Fundamentals, Data Visualization




August 2025 - Present Data Integrity Team Lead, Student Records & Registration, Rexburg, Idaho

Owned identification and correction of data inconsistencies across 15,000+ student transcript records
Initiated and facilitated weekly meetings to analyze and solve 10+ demographic and educational record tickets
Designed, built, and executed queries to flag inaccurate transcript and course transfer data
Reviewed and resolved 10+ records per week, improving coordination and turnaround time

May 2025 - December 2025 Data Visualization Specialist, Student Records & Registration, Rexburg, Idaho

Led the design and development of 25+ interactive Power BI dashboards for university departments
Collaborated with 25+ teams to extract, analyze, and visualize data
Translated complex datasets into actionable insights for decision making
Standardized daily data validation and error checking processes to improve dataset reliability

November 2024 - May 2025 Student Records and Registration Specialist, Student Records & Registration, Rexburg, Idaho

Streamlined scheduling processes for 45+ assistants
Managed 30k+ confidential student records in compliance with FERPA and institutional policies
Resolved 25+ time sensitive enrollment issues with 100% accuracy

September 2023 - September 2024 Food Services Team Lead, Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, Idaho

Led a 10 person team during high demand shifts
Maintained customer service and operational standards
Onboarded and trained 10+ new employees per semester on safety and operations




June 2025 - July 2025 Min-Max Inventory System
React Native, Firebase

Designed and deployed a mobile inventory tracker with real time sync through Firestore in 2 weeks
Enabled suppliers to update product stock daily
Implemented alerts using Firebase Cloud Functions






Python, C++, C#, R



MySQL, PostgreSQL, Firestore



HTML, Advanced CSS, Modern CSS, JavaScript



Power BI, data validation, dashboard design, bilingual English and Spanish, prompt engineering, leadership, conflict resolution, team collaboration

title: About Me
text:
Software Engineering student with a Data Science minor, focused on building real world solutions through data analysis, visualization, and software development.
I have experience working with large datasets, creating dashboards, and improving data integrity. I enjoy turning complex data into clear insights that help teams make better decisions.
